about.title: Transform Payroll into a Smart Solution
about.description: The LiberPay Salary Card is the innovative solution that simplifies payment management and brings more financial freedom to your employees. With a 100% digital, agile, and secure process, your company gains efficiency and your staff have instant access to their salary, with multiple features and exclusive benefits.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Payroll in just three simple steps

step1.title: Registration and Request
step1.description: Your company partners with LiberPay, and employees or HR can register via the app, the HR portal, or by spreadsheet. The virtual card is generated automatically, and the physical card can be requested if needed.

step2.title: Payment Management
step2.description: Payroll is sent via API or the LiberPay platform. The total amount is transferred to an escrow account and instantly distributed to each employee.

step3.title: Instant Deposit
step3.description: The salary is CREDITED directly to the card on the date set by the employer, and the employee receives a notification in the app confirming the payment.
